36be4b3e-ea64-460c-87d4-6b4ac2f5fc8b.label: text_chunk
36be4b3e-ea64-460c-87d4-6b4ac2f5fc8b.text:
LAST MAN STANDS INTERNATIONAL NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT THIS AGREEMENT is made on ____________________________________ (Date) BETWEEN 1. Last Man Stands, (the "Disclosing Party"); and 2. _____________, (the "Receiving Party"),

Collectively referred to as the "Parties".

e13dfc5a-0fc7-4143-8b25-28d3d82eb577.label: text_chunk
e13dfc5a-0fc7-4143-8b25-28d3d82eb577.text:
RECITALS

A.

 The Receiving Party understands that the Disclosing Party has disclosed or may disclose information relating to Last Man Stands which to the extent previously, presently, or subsequently disclosed to the Receiving Party is hereinafter referred to as "Proprietary Information" of the Disclosing Party.

OPERATIVE PROVISIONS

1. In consideration of the disclosure of Proprietary Information by the Disclosing Party,

23bbbc30-e735-4ac9-8ae9-61ca8353f333.label: text_chunk
23bbbc30-e735-4ac9-8ae9-61ca8353f333.text: the Receiving Party hereby agrees: (i) to hold the Proprietary Information in strict confidence and to take all reasonable precautions to protect such Proprietary Information (including, without limitation, all precautions the Receiving Party employs with respect to its own confidential materials), (ii) not to disclose any such Proprietary Information or any information derived there from to any third person,

36b26350-14fc-4103-8421-1f73bb522af0.label: text_chunk
36b26350-14fc-4103-8421-1f73bb522af0.text:
(iii) not to make any use whatsoever at any time of such Proprietary Information except to evaluate internally its relationship with the Disclosing Party, and (iv) not to copy or reverse engineer any such Proprietary Information.

 The Receiving Party shall procure that its employees, agents and sub-contractors to whom Proprietary Information is disclosed or who have access to Proprietary Information sign a nondisclosure or similar agreement in content substantially similar to this Agreement.

50f7b4c6-4d2b-4b48-b56c-d42bebd4408d.label: text_chunk
50f7b4c6-4d2b-4b48-b56c-d42bebd4408d.text: For a period of eighteen months following the execution of this agreement to the Receiving Party shall not, directly or indirectly hire, solicit, or encourage to leave the Disclosing Party employment, any employee, contractor or player of the Disclosing Party or hire any such employee or contractor who has left the Disclosing Parties employment, contractual engagement or player within one year of such employment or engagement, the Receiving Party.

d0836d67-1c16-466c-85f8-1ea71d18bd64.label: text_chunk
d0836d67-1c16-466c-85f8-1ea71d18bd64.text:
For a period of three years following the execution of this agreement, the contractor shall not start up his/her own cricket related business using the customer lists, trade secrets, inventions, innovations, processes, information, records and specifications of the Disclosing Party and/or used by the Disclosing party in connection with the operation of its business including, without limitation, the Disclosing parties business and product processes, methods, accounts and procedures.

2. Without granting any right or license,

2540e604-a4ca-4829-a1ad-97e15fc37d11.label: text_chunk
2540e604-a4ca-4829-a1ad-97e15fc37d11.text: the Disclosing Party agrees that the foregoing shall not apply with respect to any informa tion after five years following the disclosure thereof or any information that the Receiving Party can document (i) is or becomes (through no improper action or inaction by the Receiving Party or any affiliate, agent, consultant or employee) generally available to the public, or (ii) was in its possession or known by it prior to receipt from the Disclosing Party as evidenced in writing, except to the

d0f7c387-cb8b-41ac-9634-05a60f1f2910.label: text_chunk
d0f7c387-cb8b-41ac-9634-05a60f1f2910.text:
extent that such information was unlawfully appropriated, or (iii) was rightfully disclosed to it by a third party, or (iv) was independently developed without use of any Proprietary Information of the Disclosing Party. The Receiving Party may make disclosures required by law or court order provided the Receiving Party uses diligent reasonable efforts to limit disclosure and has allowed the Disclosing Party to seek a protective order.

3.

8c92073a-35f6-45aa-9080-a49c17563c7d.label: text_chunk
8c92073a-35f6-45aa-9080-a49c17563c7d.text:
Immediately upon the written request by the Disclosing Party at any time,

 the Receiving Party will return to the Disclosing Party all Proprietary Information and all documents or media containing any such Proprietary Information and any and all copies or extracts thereof, save that where such Proprietary Information is a form incapable of return or has been copied or transcribed into another document, it shall be destroyed or erased, as appropriate.

4.

d996e9e2-086e-4cf0-a61f-1c7c18049c41.label: text_chunk
d996e9e2-086e-4cf0-a61f-1c7c18049c41.text:
The Receiving Party understands that nothing herein (i) requires the disclosure of any Proprietary Information or (ii) requires the Disclosing Party to proceed with any transaction or relationship.

5.

724b2057-bba7-4097-9893-d6acb5f995a7.label: text_chunk
724b2057-bba7-4097-9893-d6acb5f995a7.text:
The Receiving Party further acknowledges and agrees that no representation or warranty,

 express or implied, is or will be made, and no responsibility or liability is or will be accepted by the Disclosing Party, or by any of its respective directors, officers, employees, agents or advisers, as to, or in relation to, the accuracy of completeness of any Proprietary Information made available to the Receiving Party or its advisers; it is responsible for making its own evaluation of such Proprietary Information.

dc5987e9-5da6-4413-b3c7-d1e583f40952.label: text_chunk
dc5987e9-5da6-4413-b3c7-d1e583f40952.text:
6.

 The failure of either party to enforce its rights under this Agreement at any time for any period shall not be construed as a waiver of such rights. If any part, term or provision of this Agreement is held to be illegal or unenforceable neither the validity, nor enforceability of the remainder of this Agreement shall be affected. Neither Party shall assign or transfer all or any part of its rights under this Agreement without the consent of the other Party.

dfb6c2c7-9cfc-48e2-9a48-67145cab7d29.label: text_chunk
dfb6c2c7-9cfc-48e2-9a48-67145cab7d29.text:
This Agreement may not be amended for any other reason without the prior written agreement of both Parties. This Agreement constitutes the entire understanding between the Parties relating to the subject matter hereof unless any representation or warranty made about this Agreement was made fraudulently and, save as may be expressly referred to or referenced herein, supersedes all prior representations, writings, negotiations or understandings with respect hereto.

7.

10762538-8679-454c-bafe-7a9da9ad5c2e.label: text_chunk
10762538-8679-454c-bafe-7a9da9ad5c2e.text: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the jurisdiction in which the Disclosing Party is located (or if the Disclosing Party is based in more than one country, the country in which its headquarters are located) (the "Territory") and the parties agree to submit disputes arising out of or in connection with this Agreement to the non-exclusive of the courts in the Territory.

community_summary.0: In the context of a non-disclosure agreement, "Last Man Stands" is identified as the Disclosing Party. This designation highlights its role in sharing confidential information, emphasizing the importance of trust and confidentiality in the relationship established by the agreement.
community_summary.1:
The relationships outlined involve three primary entities: the Disclosing Party, the Receiving Party, and the Last Man Stands. 

1. **Disclosing Party and Receiving Party**: These two entities are bound by a non-disclosure agreement (NDA), which establishes a relationship of confidentiality. The Disclosing Party is responsible for providing Proprietary Information and confidential data to the Receiving Party under this agreement. This relationship emphasizes the trust and legal obligations between the two parties regarding the handling of sensitive information.

2. **Disclosing Party and Last Man Stands**: The Last Man Stands is identified as the subject of the Proprietary Information that the Disclosing Party shares. This indicates that the information disclosed pertains specifically to this entity, highlighting its significance in the context of the confidentiality agreement.

3. **Governance**: The Disclosing Party's actions and the NDA are governed by the laws of a specified Territory, which provides a legal framework for the agreement and the obligations of both parties.

In summary, the Disclosing Party engages in a confidential relationship with the Receiving Party through a non-disclosure agreement, sharing sensitive information related to the Last Man Stands, all while being governed by the laws of a designated Territory.
community_summary.2:
**Summary of Relationships:**

1. **Receiving Party and Proprietary Information:**
   - The Receiving Party is responsible for holding, protecting, receiving, and evaluating Proprietary Information. This includes obligations to maintain strict confidentiality and take reasonable precautions against unauthorized disclosure. The Receiving Party must also assess the accuracy and completeness of the Proprietary Information it receives.

2. **Receiving Party and Disclosing Party:**
   - The Receiving Party has a protective relationship with the Disclosing Party, which includes obligations to safeguard confidential information and a prohibition against soliciting or hiring the Disclosing Party's employees or contractors. This relationship emphasizes the importance of confidentiality and trust in the exchange of information.

Overall, the relationships highlight the Receiving Party's critical role in managing Proprietary Information with care and integrity while maintaining a respectful and protective stance towards the Disclosing Party.

Specifically, the agreement prohibits the Contractor from utilizing the Disclosing Party's confidential information to initiate a competing business. This relationship underscores the importance of confidentiality and the legal obligations that protect the Disclosing Party's sensitive information from being exploited by the Contractor.

community_summary.19: The Whistleblower Protection Act is a significant piece of legislation that amends Title 5 of the United States Code. Its primary purpose is to enhance protections for whistleblowers, ensuring that individuals who report misconduct or illegal activities are safeguarded from retaliation. This relationship underscores the Act's role in promoting transparency and accountability within organizations by providing legal protections to those who come forward with critical information.

community_summary.22:
The relationships involving the Protected Critical Infrastructure Information (PCII) highlight the management and ownership dynamics surrounding this sensitive information category. 

1. **PCII and PCII Program Manager**: The PCII Program Manager is responsible for overseeing the PCII program, ensuring its operations and compliance. This indicates a management relationship where the Program Manager plays a crucial role in the program's governance.

2. **Authorization by PCII Program Manager**: The PCII Program Manager holds the authority to authorize any changes or removals of PCII, establishing a direct and significant relationship between the manager and the information category.

3. **Ownership by the United States Government**: The PCII is owned by the entity that possesses it, specifically including the United States Government. This ownership implies that the government is a key stakeholder in the management and disclosure of PCII.

In summary, the PCII Program Manager is central to the management and authorization processes of PCII, while the United States Government holds ownership, underscoring the importance of governance and compliance in handling this critical information.
community_summary.23: The relationship between "Sensitive but Unclassified Information" and "Section 552a of Title 5" highlights the legal framework that safeguards individual privacy rights. Specifically, Section 552a of Title 5 governs sensitive but unclassified information, establishing the necessary protections for personal privacy. This relationship underscores the importance of legal guidelines in managing and protecting sensitive information that does not meet the criteria for classified status but still requires careful handling to ensure privacy rights are upheld.
community_summary.24:
The Department of Homeland Security (DHS) plays a crucial role in managing and protecting sensitive information related to national security. It categorizes information as For Official Use Only (FOUO) to safeguard it from public disclosure, ensuring that sensitive details remain confidential. Additionally, DHS manages Sensitive Homeland Security Information (SHSI) to uphold national security and public safety. 

Furthermore, DHS has the authority over Authorized Individuals, who are designated personnel empowered to request the return of information from those who have accessed it, reinforcing the security protocols associated with DHS operations. Overall, these relationships underscore DHS's commitment to protecting sensitive information and maintaining national security.
community_summary.25:
The relationships outlined highlight the regulatory and enforcement dynamics between the United States Government and an Authorized Entity concerning DHS Form 11000-6 and Protected Critical Infrastructure Information (PCII).

1. **Regulation of DHS Form 11000-6**: The United States Government regulates the use and compliance of DHS Form 11000-6, which pertains to the handling and safeguarding of information under specific agreements.

2. **Authorization of the Authorized Entity**: The United States Government grants authority to the Authorized Entity, enabling it to enforce agreements and manage disclosures related to PCII.

3. **Enforcement Mechanisms**: The United States Government retains the right to seek remedies against the Authorized Entity to ensure compliance with the terms of the Agreement, establishing a legal oversight relationship.

In summary, the United States Government plays a crucial role in regulating information handling through DHS Form 11000-6, authorizing an entity to manage sensitive information, and enforcing compliance to maintain the integrity of agreements related to critical infrastructure information.

community_summary.27:
The relationships outlined highlight significant connections between various legal frameworks and protections concerning disclosures and employee rights.

1. **Executive Order No. 12958 and Section 7211 of Title 5**: Both establish guidelines and obligations regarding disclosures to Congress, emphasizing the importance of transparency and accountability in the context of employee rights and responsibilities.

2. **Section 1034 of Title 10 and the Military Whistleblower Protection Act**: Section 1034 specifically protects military members who disclose information, while the Military Whistleblower Protection Act reinforces these protections, illustrating a strong commitment to safeguarding the rights of military personnel in reporting misconduct or wrongdoing.

In summary, these relationships underscore the critical role of legal provisions in ensuring that both civilian and military employees are protected when making disclosures, thereby promoting a culture of accountability and integrity within government and military operations.

community_summary.35:
The relationships outlined highlight the City’s proactive approach to managing infrastructure and securing funding for various projects. 

1. **Funding Relationships**: The City receives financial support from Measure W, which is utilized to enhance its projects. Additionally, the City actively applies for funding from the State, particularly through programs like the State Revolving Fund, to bolster its financial resources.

2. **Project Management**: The City is responsible for managing the Marie Canyon Green Streets project, indicating its role in overseeing urban development initiatives as part of its Capital Improvement Program. Furthermore, the City oversees the City Hall Roof Replacement project, showcasing its commitment to maintaining local infrastructure.

3. **Collaboration for Improvement**: The City collaborates with FEMA to develop a storm drain inventory, leveraging federal funding to improve infrastructure in response to challenges posed by events such as the Woolsey Fire.

Overall, these relationships illustrate the City’s strategic efforts in funding acquisition, project management, and collaboration with federal agencies to enhance community infrastructure and resilience.
community_summary.36:
The summary of the relationships is as follows:

1. **Civic Center Stormwater Diversion Structure** and **Los Angeles County Flood Control**: The Civic Center Stormwater Diversion Structure project is dependent on obtaining a maintenance agreement from the Los Angeles County Flood Control organization, which is essential for the project's construction to move forward.

2. **Regulation 070** and **vehicle impact protection devices**: Regulation 070 stipulates the necessity for installing vehicle impact protection devices. This regulation aims to enhance safety in areas that are close to outdoor pedestrian seating, ensuring the protection of pedestrians in these environments. 

Overall, these relationships highlight the importance of regulatory compliance and organizational agreements in the development and safety measures of urban infrastructure projects.

community_summary.39:
The summary of relationships involving the City is as follows:

1. **Disaster Recovery Projects**: The City manages Disaster Recovery Projects aimed at restoring and improving services and infrastructure following disasters, highlighting its commitment to community resilience.

2. **Collaboration with Caltrans**: The City has engaged in discussions with Caltrans regarding project phasing, showcasing a collaborative effort in managing transportation-related projects.

3. **Evaluation of Construction Bids**: The City received and evaluated construction bids for a project but ultimately rejected them due to a budget shortfall, illustrating its active role in the procurement process and fiscal responsibility.

4. **Collaboration with the Planning Department**: The City is working alongside the Planning Department to secure CEQA clearance for various projects, indicating a cooperative approach to urban planning and regulatory compliance.

5. **Contract with Kimley Horn**: The City has formalized a contract with Kimley Horn to conduct a traffic study, reflecting its initiative to enhance traffic management through expert analysis.

6. **Traffic Signals Infrastructure**: The City maintains traffic signals as part of its infrastructure, which are essential for managing vehicular flow and ensuring public safety on the roads.

Overall, these relationships demonstrate the City's proactive management of infrastructure, collaboration with key agencies, and commitment to effective urban planning and disaster recovery.

The relationships outlined highlight the regulatory and operational dependencies between various entities:

1. **Planning Department and CEQA**: The Planning Department is required to comply with the California Environmental Quality Act (CEQA) regulations when reviewing development projects. This establishes a critical regulatory relationship that ensures environmental considerations are integrated into planning processes.

2. **Traffic Signals and Backup Power System**: Traffic signals necessitate a backup power system to ensure they remain operational during power outages. This relationship emphasizes the importance of maintaining traffic safety and functionality, highlighting the need for reliable infrastructure in urban planning.

In summary, the Planning Department's adherence to CEQA regulations is essential for responsible development oversight, while the requirement for traffic signals to have a backup power system underscores the importance of continuous operation for public safety.
